---
title: "Word Cloud v1"
author: "Monty Soladay"
date: "2026-02-12"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(wordcloud2)
library(tidyverse)
library(tidytext)

data(stop_words)

trump_tweets_data <- read.csv("filtered_trump_dat.csv")
head(trump_tweets_data)
```


```{r}
set.seed(111)

custom_stop <- tibble(
  word = c("https", "http", "x", "x.com", "t.co", "trump", "truthsocial", "truthsocial.com", "twitter", "twitter.com", "www", 
           "pic.twitter.com", "nan", "realdonaldtrump", "00", "12", "1", "u.s", "0", "10", "04", "rt", "05", "bit.ly"),
  lexicon = "custom"
)

all_stop_words <- bind_rows(stop_words, custom_stop)

t.tokens <- trump_tweets_data %>% unnest_tokens(word, text) %>% anti_join(all_stop_words)
word_freq <- t.tokens %>% count(word, sort = T)

top_n_words <- word_freq %>% slice_max(n, n = 60, with_ties = FALSE)
wordcloud2(top_n_words, size=0.7)
```
